project: Ink CLI Session UI V2 Web Parity
description: Implement owner-scoped room-first startup, /session, /room, and /new flows with Web-visible persistence.

userStories.title: Expand CLI source owner and room contracts
userStories.description: As an Ink app implementer, I need source methods that expose selected-owner rooms and room-scoped sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: CliSessionSource supports active owner, list owners where available, list rooms for owner, active room, list sessions by room, and create session in room
Local source maps Personal Chat/default room for selected owner
Existing --session direct-open behavior remains compatible with owner validation
Focused source tests cover owner/room/session filtering
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in 13c0b33. Expanded CliSessionSource with getActiveOwner(), listOwners(), owner-aware listRooms(), owner-aware listSessions(), active owner status fields, room owner/default metadata, and owner-scoped createSession default-room behavior. Local source maps selected owners to Personal Chat/default room via ChatRoomService when PiboDataStore is available and a deterministic virtual Personal Chat room otherwise; it merges persisted room rows with session-derived room metadata and preserves explicit --session compatibility through owner validation. Focused source tests cover active owner, Root recovery fallback, owner discovery, selected-owner room/session filtering, selected-owner default-room creation, and no implicit user:unknown writes. Evidence: docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run build >/tmp/pibo-build.log && node --test test/cli-session-source.test.mjs test/ink-cli-v2-current-state.test.mjs test/cli-ui-session-app.test.mjs' passed 25/25 focused tests (real source/unit path, no PTY required because no interactive picker flow was implemented in this story). docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run typecheck' passed. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm test' was run and only the unrelated telemetry-store stale/prune test failed; standalone rerun of that telemetry test also failed.

userStories.title: Implement startup owner room session flow
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want startup to guide me through owner, room, and session selection before opening a transcript.
acceptanceCriteria: Startup without --session resolves owner then shows room picker when appropriate
Selecting a room shows room-scoped sessions and a create-new-session option
Escape backs out one overlay level and Ctrl+C exits cleanly
pibo debug pty asserts owner/room/session picker sequence in a real TUI run
When marking passes true, notes include pibo debug pty command, scripted input/assertions, and raw/clean artifact paths
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in b1399a6. Implemented no `--session` startup as owner -> room -> room-scoped session flow. After owner resolution, the app opens a room picker, then a session picker filtered by the selected room with a "+ New session in this room" item; selecting it creates and opens a session using the selected owner and room. Direct --session still opens the requested session, and explicit --owner-scope skips the startup owner picker. Evidence: docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run build >/tmp/pibo-build.log && node --test test/cli-session-source.test.mjs test/cli-ui-session-app.test.mjs test/ink-cli-v2-current-state.test.mjs' passed 28/28 focused tests (real source/unit path plus Ink render/reducer tests for owner, room, create-session picker rendering and /new selected-room creation). docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && rm -rf .tmp/pty-owner-room && npm run dev -- debug pty run --artifact --artifact-dir /workspace/.tmp/pty-owner-room --timeout-ms 45000 --idle-timeout-ms 12000 --cols 100 --rows 28 --wait-for "Select effective owner" --expect "Web user alpha" --expect "Web user beta" --press Down --press Enter --wait-for "Select room for Web user beta" --press Enter --wait-for "New session in Personal Chat" --press Enter --wait-for "Created session" --press CtrlC -- env PIBO_DEBUG_PTY_CLI_SESSIONS_MOCKED=1 PIBO_DEBUG_PTY_CLI_SESSIONS_OWNERS=user:alpha,user:beta node dist/bin/pibo.js tui:sessions' passed (real PTY path with deterministic mocked local router/source, not live provider); scripted input selected Web user beta, selected Personal Chat, selected "+ New session in Personal Chat", and asserted "Created session". Raw PTY artifact: /root/code/pibo/.worktrees/ink-cli-v2-web-parity/.tmp/pty-owner-room/raw.ansi.log. Clean PTY artifact: /root/code/pibo/.worktrees/ink-cli-v2-web-parity/.tmp/pty-owner-room/clean.txt. Observed clean output shows the owner picker, room picker, session picker, and created session. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run typecheck' passed. docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm test' was run; 489/490 tests passed and the only failure remained the pre-existing unrelated telemetry-store.test.mjs stale/prune assertion.

userStories.title: Make /session and /room room-first
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want /session to choose a room first and /room to change the active room.
acceptanceCriteria: /session opens room picker, then session picker filtered to the selected room
/room changes active room and reloads room-scoped sessions
Empty rooms show clear empty state and create-new action
pibo debug pty covers /session room selection and /room switching
When marking passes true, notes include pibo debug pty command, scripted input/assertions, and raw/clean artifact paths
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Make /new owner-scoped room-scoped and Web-visible
userStories.description: As a Web and CLI user, I want /new to create sessions in the active owner's selected room so organization matches Web.
acceptanceCriteria: /new with active room creates the session in that room without another prompt
/new without active room opens room picker with Personal Chat selected by default
Created session writes sessions, session_navigation, event_log, and messages with selected owner and room metadata
pibo debug pty creates a session, sends a message, and asserts assistant output through real router/source path
Web/API/store check confirms created session appears in selected owner's room navigation
When marking passes true, notes include pibo debug pty command, scripted input/assertions, and raw/clean artifact paths
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Hydrate existing room sessions and transcript by owner
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want existing Web sessions in a room to open with transcript history in the terminal.
acceptanceCriteria: Room-scoped session picker lists existing sessions for the selected owner and room only
Opening an existing session hydrates persisted trace/history from event log
Sessions from other owners are not listed or opened unless owner is switched
pibo debug pty opens an existing session by picker and by --session <id> and asserts transcript content
When marking passes true, notes include pibo debug pty command, scripted input/assertions, and raw/clean artifact paths
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
